# Thomas Hamer

> Personal site of Thomas Hamer — Staff Engineer and AWS Solutions Architect Professional at
> Commonwealth Bank, based in Sydney, Australia. Enterprise AWS platform engineering across
> networking, observability, and identity. Royal Australian Navy veteran (Afghanistan
> deployment).

## About

This is a personal profile and portfolio site, not a company site. For IT consulting
services (identity and access management, networking, infrastructure, email security), see
Thomas's consultancy: https://hamertechnical.com.au/

## Content on this site

- Professional background and AWS certifications
- Selected work: cloud architecture case studies (video-on-demand platform, VPC/Cognito
  architecture)
- Conference talks: SSH security (CMD Solutions Zero Days, 2019), data protection and
  national security (Royal United Service Institute of NSW, 2024) — see
  https://hamer.cloud/videos/index.html
- Personal interests and Hamer family history research

## Contact

- Web: https://hamer.cloud/
- Consulting enquiries: https://hamertechnical.com.au/
